case_title: THANH CAM LUU VS. RICHMOND MUSEUM ASSOC., INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RICHMOND MUSEUM ASSOC., INC.

DEPT. 506, SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR. 8, 2011, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING, MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE DON MITCHELL. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (NO EXHIBIT RETAINED)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,139.07 FILED BY LUU, THANH CAM AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMOND MUSEUM ASSOC., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $79.50) SERVED FEB-23-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMOND MUSEUM ASSOC., INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUU, THANH CAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RICHMOND MUSEUM ASSOC., INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.
